mnemonics: ACF PACF (Autocorrelation Function & Partial Autocorrelation Function): A Cat Finds Purring, Always Catching Fish (to remember the two main functions for identifying AR and MA models)
keyPoints: Identifying the correct ARIMA(p,d,q) model order by examining ACF and PACF plots.
Understanding the difference between stationarity and non-stationarity, and the role of differencing (the 'I' in ARIMA).
Checking model adequacy through residual analysis to ensure no patterns remain in the errors.
commonMistakes: Over-differencing the series, which can introduce unnecessary correlation and weaken the model.
Misinterpreting ACF and PACF plots, leading to an incorrect selection of p and q parameters.
Forecasting without re-estimating the model with the final observation included, leading to inaccurate predictions.
